nasb.text: Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was over the Cherethites and the Pelethites; and David’s sons were chief ministers.

esv.text: and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was over the Cherethites and the Pelethites, and David’s sons were priests.

cnv.text: 耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅統管基利提人和比利提人；大衛的眾子都作領袖。

ccb.text: 耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅统管基利提人和比利提人。大卫的众子都做首领。
